name: tickerbot
description: The stock market, in SQL — scan, replay, or subscribe across ~12k US tickers and top 100 cryptos.
long_description:
Install Tickerbot in Claude Desktop and ask the live US stock market and top 100 cryptos in plain English. Scan with SQL, backtest against any past trading day, subscribe a query to a webhook and get pinged the moment it fires. 19 tools cover tickers, signals, scans, universes, news, and webhook subscriptions across ~12,000 US equities and the top 100 cryptos by market cap, refreshed every minute.

Backed by the Tickerbot API. Bring a `tb_live_*` key from [tickerbot.io/dashboard](https://tickerbot.io/dashboard) when prompted.

api_key.title: Tickerbot API key
api_key.description: Get one at https://tickerbot.io/dashboard (starts with tb_live_ or tb_test_).
